paper_title: The Reasoning Network: Neural Association as Electromagnetic Association

phase_ready.note: Retroactive AI layer from build table descriptions. Paper published but pending framing review. Claims derived from bootstrap doc and build table — full prose audit required for phase readiness.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:A]
claim_registry.name: Neural substrate is a network
claim_registry.statement: The neural system is a network in the precise sense of P1 A-1.3: neurons are nodes, synaptic connections are directed edges, and coupling κ is measurable as the ratio of active to possible synaptic connections.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:A]
claim_registry.name: Electromagnetic basis of neural association
claim_registry.statement: Neural information transmission is electromagnetic association. Thought is carrier wave transmission in a biological substrate.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:D]
claim_registry.name: FRM at cognitive scale
claim_registry.statement: f(t) = B + A·e^(−λt)·cos(ωt + φ) describes adaptive response at cognitive/neural scale, where τ_gen is the neural generation timescale.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:D]
claim_registry.name: Bridge between physical and experiential
claim_registry.statement: The FRM provides a mathematical bridge between physical substrate (electromagnetic association) and human experience (thought, reasoning). The bridge is the carrier wave: the same mechanism that transmits information in any network transmits information in neural networks.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: Neural β = 1/2
claim_registry.statement: The critical exponent β = 1/2 holds at neural scale: T_neural = 4·τ_gen_neural for neural oscillatory processes.

WHERE.mean_β_neural: scalar · dimensionless · mean β_measured across neural oscillation datasets
WHERE.σ_β: scalar · dimensionless · standard error of β across neural substrates

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Fit FRM to neural time series (EEG, LFP); extract ω; compute β = ω·τ_gen/(π); compare to 0.5 ± 2σ; finite
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: [PLACEHOLDER: pending empirical validation with neural time series data]

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: FRM fit quality at cognitive scale
claim_registry.statement: FRM provides R² ≥ 0.85 fit to neural adaptive response data, outperforming alternative functional forms by the P1 criterion (ΔR² < 0.05).

WHERE.R2_frm_neural: scalar · dimensionless · R² of FRM fit to neural time series
WHERE.R2_best_alt: scalar · dimensionless · best alternative form R²

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Fit FRM and alternatives to neural data; compare R²; finite
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Instantiation of P1 F-1.1 at cognitive scale

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: Carrier wave necessity in neural transmission
claim_registry.statement: Neural information transmission requires an oscillatory carrier (rhythmicity). Non-oscillatory neural transmission decays to noise — the signal cannot persist across time without a carrier wave.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: EXISTS neural_system NS SUCH THAT (information_transmitted(NS) = TRUE) AND (oscillatory_component(NS) = FALSE) AND (signal_persists_beyond_tau_gen(NS) = TRUE)

WHERE.information_transmitted: boolean · TRUE if NS transmits distinguishable states
WHERE.oscillatory_component: boolean · TRUE if time series contains detectable periodic component (significance p < 0.05)
WHERE.signal_persists_beyond_tau_gen: boolean · TRUE if signal-to-noise ratio remains above detection threshold beyond one generation timescale

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Measure neural time series; test for oscillatory component; test signal persistence; single counterexample sufficient; finite
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: [PLACEHOLDER: full derivation of rhythmicity as necessary carrier pending P11 thermodynamic bridge]

placeholder_register.description: Neural β = 1/2 empirical validation. Requires neural time series data with known τ_gen.
Carrier wave necessity at neural scale. Full derivation pending P11.
placeholder_register.target_session: OPEN — resolves with P11 thermodynamic derivation
